## STRONG CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER
Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong stands as the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for the application of a ceramic coating. Free from softening additives and residue, it ensures no interference with the quality of a ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather, including vegan leather.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-strong-1.jpg?v=1702513683&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-strong.jpg?v=1702513683&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-banner.jpg?v=1702513683&width=2400)

Safe deep clean
Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong is an efficient and effective pre-coating leather cleaner, developed in tandem with Gyeon’s high-end Q² LeatherShield. It stands as the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, removing dirt, oily residue, and discoloration. 
Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula excludes any softening or preserving additives, leaving the surface ready for coating

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-glass-cleaner_195e98be-cca3-4fce-9747-c51772c714c7.jpg?v=1702514049&width=1080)

Resistant to UV, abrasion, dye, and spills. Works on vegan leather as well.

## Interior Detailer
Provides a quick clean, and eliminates 99% of bacteria and germs. Safe on *all *surfaces including Alcantara and LCD screens.

[
Shop GYEON Interior Detailer
](https://carzilla.ca/collections/brand-gyeon/products/gyeon-q-m-interior-detailer-500ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong-banner.jpg?v=1702513683&width=2400)

Works on vinyl and plastics
Start by vacuuming the upholstery. Mix Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong with water to increase foam and aid in distributing the cleaner. Apply the solution using the Q²M LeatherBrush, working in sections. 
**TIP:** Remove dirt with a microfiber in a straight motion. Utilize at least three towels: one for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds, and another one to dry the surface.

Description

# 

## GYEON Leather Cleaner Strong

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__06_Leaflet_InteriorSurfaceProtection_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong is an efficient and effective pre-coating leather cleaner. Developed along with Gyeon’s high-end Q² Leather Shield, it is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application. It removes dirt, oily residue and discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include any softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong along with water, to increase the foam and help distributing the cleaner. Use the Q²M Leather Brush. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface.

CONSUMPTION: 100ml/car

PH LEVEL: 10

### STRONG CLEAN FOR ANY TYPE OF LEATHER

Q²M Leather Cleaner Strong is the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for application of a quartz coating. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality quartz coating. Q²M Leather Cleaner leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

Does it work on aniline and semi-aniline leather?

Leather Cleaner Mild & Strong only works with 'finished' or coated automotive leather. Do not use on Aniline un-coated leather or semi aniline leather. 
Use GYEON LeatherCleaner Natural instead, this one's safe on aniline and semi-aniline.

Will it remove dye transfer?

Yes and no. It depends on how long the dye has been on the leather. Leather is fairly porous, and dye can migrate *into *the material, making it challenging to remove. If caught within a few days, Leather Cleaner Strong can potentially remove it. However, if the dye is etched into the leather, redyeing the finish may be necessary.

Is it shiny?

No, both Leather Cleaner Strong and Mild will yield a matte finish.

What else can I clean with it?

Not limited to leather, it can also clean plastics, vinyl, vegan leather, dashboards, and trim.

Does it lather?

Yes, it will lather when agitated with a brush and works in a foaming bottle as well.

What's the difference between Mild and Strong?

Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.
Though Strong has slightly higher pH, but it won't damage anything, it's safe-strong.
